positive: Minimalist geometric arrangement featuring stylized flora (leaves, ferns, abstract blossoms) interwoven with constellations and celestial map elements. The design should have clean, thick outlines and strong contrast, using a palette of deep midnight blue, muted teal, copper gold, and creamy off-white. Composition must be centrally focused and scalable, suitable for printing on apparel. The overall mood is esoteric, natural, and mystical, rendered in a sophisticated, slightly Art Deco inspired style. High detail, vectorized quality, intricate linework, perfect symmetry, symmetrical balance.
